transcript: You're outta your mind! Don't bring anything over here, because I don't even know what the hell you're talkin' about!
Listen, don't fuckin' call over here, gettin' rude with my mother! Are you fuckin' crazy?
What the fuck are you talking about? You are a sick bastard, you know that?
Hey, don't mess with me, fucker! Do you... I mean, are you stupid, or what?
Hey, hey... you know what? You come over here with your fish, you stupid bastard! Why don't you come over here right now? I'd love to see this!
You know what, bastard? You're gonna pay!
Well, just... come on over, okay? Come on over, you stupid ignorant... fucker.
You know what, you son of a bitch? You can try and come over and hit me in the lips! [laughs] You're a jackass!
